html:
Exclusive to:

The Moon Glass Axe is a version of the normal Axe that is exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them.

It can be crafted with 2 Twigs and 3 Moon Shards, doing so requires that the player to be close to the Celestial Altar or an Upgraded Celestial Orb and can be prototyped. It is 2.5 times as efficient as the normal Axe. This means that Small Trees will take 2 hits, medium Trees will take 4 hits, and large Trees will take 6 hits to be chopped down. When used to attack Shadow Creatures, Shadow Pieces, or Reanimated Skeletons, it consumes less durability. Attacking any other creatures will cause it to lose more durability instead.

The Physical damage is increase by 25% when fighting weak Shadow Creatures (Crawling Horror, Terrorbeak and Lurking Nightmare).

Contents

  • 1 Comparison
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

  • Consuming dishes with reduces the required number of chops by half. This effect does not apply to the Obsidian Axe.
  • The efficiency of the Shadow Maul varies depending on its level, so it is not listed in the table.
  • Some Characters has different effiency. For example, Wes works 0.5x efficiency and strong Wolfgang works 2x efficiency.

Usage

To chop down a Tree with the Axe, players can right-click it from the inventory to equip it and left-click the Tree (Or press "X" in the console edition). Once the player begins to chop the Tree, holding down the LMB or Spacebar will have the player character keep chopping until the Tree falls. Alternatively, one can chop faster by repeatedly clicking LMB with specific timing.

In addition to chopping down trees, Axes are used in the following crafting recipes.

Outside of chopping trees, the Axe can be a cheap tool to be used as a weapon for early game survival.

Trivia

  • The Moon Glass Axe was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

Gallery

  • Unused Moon Glass Axe Blueprint

Exclusive to:
“I've made it extra effective.”
–Wilson
“The moon HATES trees.”
–Willow
“Is for swing and chop.”
–Wolfgang
“Death is so anticlimactic for trees.”
–Wendy
“EFFICIENCY UP 33%”
–WX-78
“Always strive for greater efficacy.”
–Wickerbottom
“Still not as good as Lucy.”
–Woodie
“Go on. Axe me what the moon's made of.”
–Maxwell
“Spirits öf the wööds stand nö chance against me.”
–Wigfrid
“We think it cuts better than a regular axe.”
–Webber
“This will cut my work time in half!”
–Warly
“Clear Rock Chopper”
–Wormwood
“Anything to make gettin' firewood easier.”
–Winona
“Swing and a chop, all the trees drop!”
–Wortox
“Chop extra good, florp!”
–Wurt
“Hey... it just occurred to me that this might be dangerous.”
–Walter
“A sharp tool makes for faster chopping!”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rìu Thủy Tinh Mặt Trăng là một phiên bản của Rìu thông thường chỉ dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them.
